free_text: Spin dependence in inelastic scattering
A movable array of seven surface-barrier
detectors in the computer-controlled 70-in. scattering
chamber - for the proton inelastic scattering data and
some of the alpha-particle scattering data.
A movable array of four delta-E counter
telescopes in the 70-in. scattering chamber - for the
deuteron inelastic-scattering data.
A position-sensitive surface-barrier
detector placed in the focal plane of an Enge
split-pole magnetic spectrograph - for the 3He and some
of the alpha-particle inelastic scattering data.
The 63Cu, 65Cu, and 67Zn targets were rolled metal
foils, isotopically enriched, with thicknesses ranging
from 0.4 to 0.9 mg/cm2.
OG
No information on source of uncertainties.
